recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Open Water 2: Adrift
recommendations.overview: A weekend cruise on a luxurious party yacht goes horribly wrong for a group of old high-school friends when they get stuck in the water many miles from shore and a happy reunion turns into a fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Beast of War
recommendations.overview: When their boat sinks while crossing the Timor Sea during World War II, a troop of young Australian soldiers must find a way to survive the harsh seas on a quickly shrinking raft. Hundreds of miles from anywhere, they must confront interpersonal conf

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Giant Octopus
recommendations.overview: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures as they battle each other for supremacy of the sea.

recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: A man gets stuck in an empty high rise without food, water or electricity.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Toxic Shark
recommendations.overview: A tropical singles retreat takes a terrifying turn when guests realize a poisonous shark is infesting the surrounding water. Not only will it rip apart its victims, but it also uses projectile acid to hunt - in and out of the water.

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: Vacancy
recommendations.overview: A young married couple becomes stranded at an isolated motel and find hidden video cameras in their room. They realize that unless they escape, they'll be the next victims of a snuff film.
